channel.title: Stdy on allokkio
channel.description: Recent content in Stdy on allokkio

item.title: Open Learning 2017 Edition
item.description: In high school I had the epiphany that it is better to follow good teachers then good topics. Throughout my studies I tried to follow that maxim as good as possible, but forgot about it recently. This year I want to re-establish my principle once more. With that in mind I ordered the learning stuff into 3 categories. Data Sciences & Computer Stuff Hadley Wickham PLOTCON 2016 - New open viz in R Data Science with R Managing many models with R Data Science in the Tidyverse R for Data Science book progression [++++-] Norman J.
